problem.title: 1. Two Sum
problem.problemStatement:
Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use thesame element twice.

You can return the answer in any order.
problem.constraints:
• 2 ≤ nums.length ≤ 10
  • -10 ≤ nums[i] ≤ 10
  • -10 ≤ target ≤ 10
  • Only one valid answer exists.
problem.handlerFunction: e=>{try{let t=[[2,7,11,15],[3,2,4],[3,3]],r=[9,6,6],n=[[0,1],[1,2],[0,1]];for(let o=0;o<t.length;o++){let i=e(t[o],r[o]);a().deepStrictEqual(i,n[o])}return!0}catch(e){throw console.log("twoSum handler function error"),Error(e)}}
